details.test: Task 1: Add most energy-efficient electric oven under $900 to cart
Task 2: Compare two cooking products and wishlist one with longest warranty
Task 3: Create bundle of two products within dynamic budget
Task 4: Buy 2 units of highest-rated compatible product
Task 5: Start guest checkout with standard shipping and credit card
Task 6: Order 3 units of a product by updating cart quantity
Task 7: Add filtered cooking product to wishlist
Task 8: Add efficient product and standard installation service to cart
Task 9: Apply HEAT10 discount code to eligible cooking product
